design_philosophy: A command-center for vendor hiring. High information density managed through sharp, grid-aligned borders and generous internal padding. We avoid soft, generic SaaS fluff in favor of authoritative corporate clarity using IBM Blue and Slate.

layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Mode B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID. Base grid 12 columns for fine-grained control. Dense gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). No wasted space, optical alignment on all tabular data.

surface_styles.global: Grid Borders (The Technical Look). Minimal shadows. Authority and truth derived from stark, bordered grids.
surface_styles.header: bg-white border-b border-slate-200 sticky top-0 z-50 h-16 flex items-center

components_instructions.buttons: Flat, sharp. Primary: bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-700 rounded-md. Secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-md.
components_instructions.tables: Dense rows. Header text is tiny, uppercase, high tracking (overline style). Striped rows or subtle hover bg-slate-50.
components_instructions.kpi_cards: Use bento grid for KPIs. Each card must be clickable (cursor-pointer). Values in JetBrains Mono or Cabinet Grotesk. Include trend indicators.
components_instructions.charts: Recharts. Use sharp angles, no rounded corners on bars. Colors must map to the status palette.
components_instructions.filters: Inline at the top of tables/lists. Use Shadcn select, popovers.
components_instructions.icons: lucide-react, size 16 or 20, stroke width 1.5. (No extra dependencies).
components_instructions.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='nav-home').

logos.description: Abstract logo for the hiring platform

backgrounds.description: Corporate architecture background for authentication pages

avatars.description: Avatar for the logged-in HR Manager

specific_page_guidelines.navigation: Top navigation bar (sticky). White background, 1px bottom border. Links: Home, Job Openings, Candidates, Interviews, Clients, Contacts, Analysis.
specific_page_guidelines.home_dashboard: Top row: 4 KPI bento cards (Total Openings, Total Candidates, Interviews, Selected). Middle: Pipeline Funnel (Recharts) and Vendor active nominations chart. Bottom: Recent candidates list.
specific_page_guidelines.candidates_view: Master table view. Multi-level filters above the table (Vendor, Role, Stage). Use 'text-xs' for data cells. Add a side-sheet or dialog for detailed timeline and feedback history.
specific_page_guidelines.interviews: Kanban or dense list view grouped by date. Include quick actions for 'Add Feedback'.
specific_page_guidelines.analysis: Data-heavy. Use Grid Borders strictly here. Recharts for funnel conversion and vendor performance scoring.
